description: Focused ~35s clip of the Chat surface: open Chat, ask Apple Foundation a question, show the model selector breadth. Narration-paced — each scene ends when the narrator finishes. (Phase TM 2026-05-29: tightened — removed arbitrary post-action beats; narrations sized so dialog fills the wait time where actions need to settle.)

scenes.name: Open on home
scenes.narration: Why settle for one AI? Use the right model for any task.

scenes.name: Tap Chat
scenes.narration: One chat for any model, starting with Apple's.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap Chat to open the chat surface.

scenes.name: Type a question
scenes.narration: Just start typing. Let's see if it knows any good walrus jokes.
requires: Tell me a joke about a Walrus
scenes.fallbackNarration: Type your question — the keyboard pops up like any iOS app.

actions.text: Tell me a joke about a Walrus

scenes.name: Send the message
scenes.narration: Send it. Apple Foundation answers on-device, so your data never even hits the cloud.
requires: Tell me a joke about a Walrus
scenes.fallbackNarration: Send it from the keyboard or the arrow button — Apple Foundation runs locally.

scenes.name: Tap the model pill
scenes.narration: Different task? Let's swap in Claude for writing.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap the pill at the top of the chat.

scenes.name: Show the model picker
scenes.narration: Apple Foundation is your private, on-device default. mChatAI Cloud adds specialized tools like Claude for writing and Perplexity for search—no API keys needed.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Pick the model that fits your task.

scenes.name: Dismiss the picker
scenes.narration: Let's stick with Apple's on-device model.
scenes.fallbackNarration: Tap Done to return to the chat.

scenes.name: Back to home
scenes.narration: Your conversation is saved, right alongside your AI to-dos.
